mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_legal_obligation WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY CASE status WHEN 'fail' THEN 0 WHEN 'delay' THEN 1 WHEN 'doing' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, next_due_date ASC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_legal_obligation WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_legal_obligation WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_legal_obligation WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = #{status}
SELECT ISNULL(SUM(progress), 0) FROM tb_legal_obligation WHERE deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_legal_obligation ( obligation_type, category, obligation_name, base_law, cycle, dept, owner_name, due_date, next_due_date, status, progress, evidence, penalty, icon, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{obligationType}, #{category}, #{obligationName}, #{baseLaw}, #{cycle}, #{dept}, #{ownerName}, #{dueDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{nextDueDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{status}'doing', #{progress}0, #{evidence}, #{penalty}, #{icon}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_legal_obligation SET obligation_type = #{obligationType}, category = #{category}, obligation_name = #{obligationName}, base_law = #{baseLaw}, cycle = #{cycle}, dept = #{dept}, owner_name = #{ownerName}, due_date = #{dueDate,jdbcType=DATE}, next_due_date = #{nextDueDate,jdbcType=DATE}, status = #{status}, progress = #{progress}0, evidence = #{evidence}, penalty = #{penalty}, icon = #{icon}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_legal_obligation SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
